title: AttachmentRef
description: Attachment reference provided by rustpush after decryption. If encryption_key/iv/auth_tag are absent, attachment is unencrypted. If present, Kotlin must decrypt using AES-256-GCM and verify checksum.

url.description: iCloud CDN or relay-proxied HTTPS URL

encryption_key.description: 32-byte AES-256-GCM key, Base64-encoded (required if encrypted; absent if not)

iv.description: 12-byte AES-GCM nonce, Base64-encoded (required if encrypted; absent if not)

auth_tag.description: 16-byte GCM authentication tag, Base64-encoded (required if encrypted; absent if not)

checksum.description: SHA-256 hex digest of decrypted plaintext (optional; if present, Kotlin must verify before rendering; if absent, skip verification)
